---
title: "Person"
---

<meta name="slot-title-class" content="slot-title-person">

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button onclick="setZoom(0.9)">A−</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1)">A</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1.2)">A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', scale);
  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', scale);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('site-zoom');
  if (saved) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', saved);
  }

  const cls = document.querySelector('meta[name="slot-title-class"]')?.content;
  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");
  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```



[Titel] + [Personenname] + [Determinative] + [Epitheta]


## Titel


Allgemein:

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imi-rꜣ* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/01_jmj-rA_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/01_jmj-rA_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Vorsteher </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥry* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/02_Hry_MR_01.png){.glyph} (MR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Oberer </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imꜣḫ* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_02.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_03.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_04.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_04.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_MR_01.png){.glyph} (MR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Ehrwürdiger / Versorgter </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb imꜣḫ* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/04_nb-jmAx_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr der Erwürdigkeit </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *wsir* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/05_wsjr_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/05_wsjr_02.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/05_wsjr_03.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Osiris </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


weiblich:

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb.t pr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/f/01_nb.t-pr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herrin des Hauses </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥm.t-nṯr ḥw.t-ḥr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/f/02_Hm.t-nTr-Hw.t-Hr_AR_01.png){.glyph} (AR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Priesterin der Hathor </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥw.t-ḥr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/f/02_Hw.t-Hr_Roem._01.png){.glyph} (röm.) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Hathor </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *šmꜥy.t-imn* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Titel/f/03_Smay.t-jmn_NR-3.Zw.Zt._01.png){.glyph} (NR; 3. Zw.Zt.) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Sängerin des Amun </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Personenname


wichtiges Bildungsmuster für weibliche Namen:

- *tꜣ-di-* ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Personennamen/Namen/f/01_tA-dj-Gottheit/01_tA-dj_01.png){.glyph} ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Personennamen/Namen/f/01_tA-dj-Gottheit/01_tA-dj_02.png){.glyph} + [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit}


wichtiges Bildungsmuster für männliche Namen:

- *pꜣ-di-* ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Personennamen/Namen/m/01_pA-dj-Gottheit/01_pA-dj_01.png){.glyph} ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Personennamen/Namen/m/01_pA-dj-Gottheit/01_pA-dj_02.png){.glyph} + [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit}


## Determinative

<div class='tableFixHead table-fixed'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> männlich </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> weiblich </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Personennamen/Determinative/m/01_A1_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Personennamen/Determinative/m/02_A52_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Personennamen/Determinative/f/01_B1_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Personennamen/Determinative/f/02_B1G_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Personennamen/Determinative/f/03_B8_01.png){.glyph} </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Epitheta

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mꜣꜥ-ḫrw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_02.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_03.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_NR_01.png){.glyph} (NR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_Spaet._01.png){.glyph} (Spät.) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_Spaet._02.png){.glyph} (Spät.) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Gerechtfertigter </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>





```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
